text:
Project Guidelines – 20 Marks 
1. Project Video (5 Marks) 
• Create a clear demonstration video of your project. 
• Each team member must appear in the video and explain their individual contribution. 
• Include project overview, working demo, and key features. 
2. Project Report (5 Marks) 
Title Page 
• Project Title 
• College Logo 
•  Team Members (Names & IDs) 
•  Course Name 
•  Faculty Name 
•  Institution Name 
Index Page 
• Table of contents with page numbers 
Abstract 
• Problem statement 
• Proposed solution 
• Key outcomes 
Methodology 
• Models/techniques used 
• System architecture (diagram + explanation) 
• Workflow of the project 
Results 
• Output of the system 
• Performance metrics 
• Observations 
Screenshots 
• UI screenshots / important outputs 
Conclusion 
• Summary o

ystem 
• Performance metrics 
• Observations 
Screenshots 
• UI screenshots / important outputs 
Conclusion 
• Summary of achievements 
• Future scope

3. Idea & Application Level (5 Marks) 
• Basic: Simple implementation 
• Application: Real-world problem solving 
• Research: Novel idea / advanced techniques 
4. Code & Report Quality (5 Marks) 
• Clean, well-structured code 
• Proper documentation 
• Report clarity 
5. Viva (5 Marks) 
• Understanding of project 
• Code explanation 
• Models used
